{{Short description|none}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Botswana women's national football team}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name              = Botswana 
| Badge             = 
| Nickname          = {{lang|tn|Dipitse}} (The Zebras)
| Association       = [[Botswana Football Association]] (BFA)
| Sub-confederation = [[Council of Southern Africa Football Associations|COSAFA]] (Southern Africa)
| Confederation     = [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]] (Africa)
| Coach             = [[Morena Ramoreboli]] 
| Captain           = [[Thatayaone Ditlhokwe]]
| Most caps         = [[Mosha Gaolaolwe]] (97)
| Top scorer        = [[Jerome Ramatlhakwane]] (24)
| Home Stadium      = [[Botswana National Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme    = BOT
| FIFA Rank         = {{FIFA World Rankings|BOT}}
| FIFA max          = 53
| FIFA max date     = December 2010
| FIFA min          = 165
| FIFA min date     = November 1999 – February 2000
| Elo Rank          = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Botswana}}
| Elo max           = 98 
| Elo max date      = August 2011
| Elo min           = 187
| Elo min date      = March 1997

| pattern_la1       = _bot21a
| pattern_b1        = _bot21h
| pattern_ra1       = _bot21a
| pattern_sh1       = 
| pattern_so1       = _bot21h
| leftarm1          = ffffff
| body1             = 00A2E8
| rightarm1         = ffffff
| shorts1           = 5fb1ff
| socks1            = 5fb1ff
| pattern_la2       = _bot21a 
| pattern_b2        = _bot21a
| pattern_ra2       = _bot21a 
| pattern_sh2       =  
| pattern_so2       = _bot21a 
| leftarm2          = 000000
| body2             = 000000
| rightarm2         = 000000
| shorts2           = 
| socks2            = ffffff
| pattern_la3       = _bot21t 
| pattern_b3        = _bot21t
| pattern_ra3       = _bot21t
| pattern_sh3       =  
| pattern_so3       = _bot21t
| leftarm3          = ffffff
| body3             = ffffff
| rightarm3         = ffffff
| shorts3           = 000000
| socks3            = 000000

| First game            = {{fb|MWI}} 8–1 {{fb-rt|BOT}}<br>([[Malawi]]; 13 July 1968)
| Largest win           = {{fb|BOT}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|MRI}}<br>([[Polokwane]], [[South Africa]]; 1 June 2018)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|MWI}} 8–1 {{fb-rt|BOT}}<br>(Malawi; 13 July 1968)<br>{{fb|BOT}} 0–7 {{fb-rt|ZIM}}<br>([[Gaborone]], Botswana; 26 August 1990)
| World cup apps        = 
| World cup first       = 
| World cup best        = 
| Regional name         = [[Africa Cup of Nations]]
| Regional cup apps     = 2
| Regional cup first    = [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]
| Regional cup best     = Group stage ([[2012 African Cup of Nations|2012]], [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]])
| 2ndRegional name      = 
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 
| 2ndRegional cup first = 
| 2ndRegional cup best  = 
| 3rdRegional name      = [[COSAFA Cup]]
| 3rdRegional cup apps  = 19
| 3rdRegional cup first = [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]
| 3rdRegional cup best  = Runners-up ([[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016]], [[2019 COSAFA Cup|2019]])
| medaltemplates        = 
{{MedalCompetition|[[COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016 Namibia]]|[[2016 COSAFA Cup squads#Botswana|Team]]}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2019 COSAFA Cup|2019 South Africa]]|}}
}}

The '''Botswana national football team''' ({{langx|tn|Setlhopha sa bosetšhaba sa kgwele ya dinao sa Botswana}}) represents [[Botswana]] in men's international [[association football]]. It is governed by the [[Botswana Football Association|Botswana Football Association (BFA)]] which was founded in 1970.

As of December 2025, the team has qualified for two editions of [[Africa Cup of Nations]], in [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]<ref>{{cite web |url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/football/africa/9437211.stm |title=BBC Sport – Football – Minnows Botswana qualify for Africa Cup of Nations |work=BBC News |date=26 March 2011 |access-date=15 November 2013 |archive-date=4 April 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230404180159/http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/football/africa/9437211.stm |url-status=live }}</ref> and [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]],<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/c4gmxggxn99o | title=Afcon 2025: Botswana, Mozambique and Tanzania round off qualifiers for finals | date=19 November 2024 }}</ref> and it has not managed to qualify for the [[FIFA World Cup]]. The team also participates in the regional [[COSAFA Cup]] which is open to [[COSAFA|Southern African national teams]] and takes place annually; Botswana's best result in the cup to date is finishing runners-up in the [[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016]] and [[2019 COSAFA Cup|2019]] editions.

==History==
Botswana's first unofficial match was an 8–1 loss against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]] on 13 July 1968,<ref name="RSSSF">{{Cite web |title=Botswana - List of International Matches |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesb/bots-intres.html |website=RSSSF}}</ref> and they became affiliated with [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]] in early 1976. Botswana's first official match was the 3–2 loss against [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]] on 30 August 1976.<ref name=":1">{{cite news |date=17 September 2016 |title=Zebras 50-year transformation |url=https://link.gale.com/apps/doc/A464904299/STND?u=tplmain&sid=STND&xid=6cc2b1d6 |accessdate=22 February 2020 |work=Botswana Daily News |publisher=Knowledge Bylanes |location=[[Gaborone]] |quote=On the score-sheet were legendries in Township Rollers captain, Clement 'Muller' Mothelesi, Morwalela 'Pro' Seema, also from Rollers, and Willie 'Paymaster' Dennison from Notwane}}</ref> Botswana then joined [[FIFA]] in 1978.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Football |first=CAF – Confederation of African |title=CAF – Member Associations – Botswana Football Association – Home |url=http://www.cafonline.com/en-us/memberassociations/botswanafootballassociation/Home |access-date=2018-03-23 |website=cafonline.com |language=en-US}}</ref>

It took part in its first preliminary competition for the [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994 World Cup]] in the [[United States]], where it faced [[Niger national football team|Niger]] and [[Ivory Coast national football team|Ivory Coast]]. It managed a 0–0 draw with the latter in [[Gaborone]], and lost its other 3 matches, finishing last in its group.

The next competition it entered was for the [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002 World Cup]], where it faced [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]] in a 2-legged tie to decide which team would advance to the group stages. Zambia won both legs of the tie to qualify and knock Botswana out. 

After this, Botswana lost 3–0 to Zambia and to second-string sides from [[South Africa national football team|South Africa]] and [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] at home in Gaborone. A draw with [[Madagascar national football team|Madagascar]] which was ranked at 146th in the world at the time, led Botswana FA to sack manager [[Colwyn Rowe]], who had guided Botswana to its then-highest ever [[FIFA World Rankings|FIFA ranking]] of 95th. BFA claimed this move was taken because it feared for his safety from angry fans. [[Stanley Tshosane]] was named as his replacement and in his first game in charge, Botswana achieved a 2–1 win away to [[Mozambique national football team|Mozambique]]. While achieving a draw with Ivory Coast, Botswana finished bottom of its qualifying group for the [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010 World Cup]] in [[South Africa]].

Botswana defied its ranking to become the first team to qualify for the [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations]], beating [[Tunisia national football team|Tunisia]] both at home and away. This coincided with a rise to its highest ever FIFA ranking of 53rd. It did not manage to build upon this upturn in form at the tournament, losing more narrowly to [[Ghana national football team|Ghana]] and [[Mali national football team|Mali]] and more heavily to [[Guinea national football team|Guinea]] to finish bottom of its group with 0 points.

The truncated qualification format for the [[2013 Africa Cup of Nations]] saw Botswana face Mali in a two-legged tie, which Botswana lost 7–1 on aggregate. Botswana failed to qualify for the [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014 World Cup]], finishing third in its group with 7 points behind South Africa and [[Ethiopia national football team|Ethiopia]].

In October 2013, BFA sacked Tshosane, citing his "failing to meet the targets set for him". It subsequently appointed Englishman [[Peter Butler (footballer, born 1966)|Peter Butler]] in February 2014.

Beating [[Burundi national football team|Burundi]] and [[Guinea-Bissau national football team|Guinea-Bissau]] in the knockout rounds, it finished last in its qualifying group for the [[2015 Africa Cup of Nations]] with a single point. In its qualifying group for the [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations]], it finished third - 7 points behind qualifiers Burkina Faso and Uganda. In the qualifiers for the [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018 World Cup]], it beat [[Eritrea national football team|Eritrea]] in the first round and won 2–1 at home against Mali in the first leg of the second round. A 2–0 win for Mali in [[Bamako]] meant that Botswana lost on aggregate and failed to make the group stages.

In July 2017, [[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]] became manager of the Zebras for the 4th time after BFA chose not to renew Butler's contract. He led the team during qualifiers for the [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations]], in which Botswana scored only 1 goal in its 6 [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group I|Group I matches]].

[[File:Brandon Wilson.jpg|thumb|150px|right|[[Brandon Wilson (footballer, born 1997)|Brandon Wilson]] received his first call up for Botswana in 2023]]

Botswana made a poor start to their [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations]] qualification campaign, with two losses leading many to believe they had little chance of making it to Morocco.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://africanfootball.com/news/821047/Egypt-hammer-hapless-Botswana | title=Egypt hammer hapless Botswana - 2025 Africa Cup of Nations Qualifiers }}</ref> Despite this, they then picked up eight points from a possible twelve on offer, a 1–1 draw away against [[Egypt national football team|Egypt]] in their last match of the campaign sealing qualification for only their second ever Africa Cup of Nations.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.cafonline.com/caf-africa-cup-of-nations/news/botswana-return-to-afcon-after-12-year-absence-mauritania-cape-verde-miss-out/ | title=Botswana return to AFCON after 12-year absence - Mauritania, Cape Verde miss out }}</ref> This was despite manager [[Didier Gomes Da Rosa]] resigning to take charge of Al Ahli,<ref>{{cite web | title=Botswana coach details reasons for departure | url=https://supersport.com/hereforher/news/7a19361b-8ff9-4fa6-9d5d-a72055ab2d66/botswana-coach-details-reasons-for-departureslug=botswana-coach-details-reasons-for-departure }}</ref> meaning [[Morena Ramoreboli]] took interim charge for the team's last two matches.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.idiskitimes.co.za/sa-stars-abroad/official-ramoreboli-lands-new-job/ | title=Official: Ramoreboli Lands New Job | date=23 October 2024 }}</ref>

==Results and fixtures==
{{See Also|Botswana national football team results (2020–present)}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 COSAFA Cup#Group D|2025 COSAFA Cup]]
|date       = 6 June
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|+2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|COM}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
|report     = https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2025/06/09/africa/cosafa-cup/comoros/botswana/4656962/
|goals1     =
|goals2     = 
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|stadium    = [[Dr. Petrus Molemela Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Arnaud Zafimahatoha ([[Malagasy Football Federation|Madagascar]])
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 COSAFA Cup#Group D|2025 COSAFA Cup]]
|date       = 11 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|+2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|score      = 3–3
|team2      = {{fb|ZAM}}
|report     = https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2025/06/11/africa/cosafa-cup/botswana/zambia/4656963/
|goals1     = 
*[[Thatayaone Kgamanyane|Kgamanyane]] {{goal|2}}
*[[Serati Semadi|Semadi]] {{goal|32|pen.}}
*[[Thabo Maponda|Maponda]] {{goal|60}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Charles Zulu|Zulu]] {{goal|45+3|pen.}}
*[[Tinklar Sinkala|Sinkala]] {{goal|52}}
*[[Joseph Phiri|Jo. Phiri]] {{goal|90|pen.}}
|location   = [[Bloemfontein]], South Africa
|stadium    = [[Dr. Petrus Molemela Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Akhona Makalima]] ([[South African Football Association|South Africa]])
|result     = D
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group G|2026 World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 4 September
| time       = {{UTZ|20:00|+1}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|ALG}}
| score      = 3–1
| report     = https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2025/09/04/africa/wc-qualifying-africa/algeria/botswana/4236956/
| team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
| goals1     = 
*[[Mohamed Amoura|Amoura]] {{Goal|33}}
*[[Baghdad Bounedjah|Bounedjah]] {{Goal|71||90+6}}
| goals2     = 
*[[Tebogo Kopelang|Kopelang]] {{Goal|43}}
| stadium    = [[Hocine Aït Ahmed Stadium]]
| location   = [[Tizi Ouzou]], Algeria
| attendance = 
| referee    = Pacifique Ndabihawenimana ([[Football Federation of Burundi|Burundi]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group G|2026 World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 8 September
| time       = {{UTZ|15:00|2}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|MOZ}}
| score      = 2–0
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288282/288289/400020800
| team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
| goals1     = 
*[[Witi]] {{goal|6}}
*[[Faisal Bangal|Bangal]] {{goal|71}}
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Estádio do Zimpeto]]
| location   = [[Maputo]], Mozambique
| attendance = 20,000
| referee    = [[Bamlak Tessema Weyesa]] ([[Ethiopian Football Federation|Ethiopia]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group G|2026 World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 9 October
| time       = {{UTZ|18:00|2}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
| score      = 0–1
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288282/288289/400021064
| team2      = {{fb|UGA}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
*[[Jude Ssemugabi|Ssemugabi]] {{goal|54}}
| stadium    = [[Obed Itani Chilume Stadium]]
| location   = [[Francistown]], Botswana
| attendance = 
| referee    = Dahane Beida ([[Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Mauritania|Mauritania]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group G|2026 World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 14 October
| time       = {{UTZ|17:00|1}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|GUI}}
| score      = 2–2
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288282/288289/400021067
| team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
| goals1     = 
*[[Abdoul Karim Traoré|Traoré]] {{goal|18}}
*[[Aliou Baldé|Baldé]] {{goal|35}}
| goals2     = 
*[[Segolame Boy|Boy]] {{goal|7}}
*[[Gape Mohutsiwa|Mohutsiwa]] {{goal|45+2}}
| stadium    = [[Stade Mohammed V]]
| location   = [[Casablanca]], Morocco
| attendance = 500
| referee    = Messie Jessie Oved Nkounkou ([[Congolese Football Federation|Congo]])
| result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|date       = 18 December
|round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|1}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|TUN}}
|score      = 2–1
|team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
|report     = https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/botswana-naNvXTwI/tunisia-QqZVYk95/?mid=IiijJBiS
|goals1     = 
*[[Naïm Sliti|Sliti]] {{goal|85||90+4|p}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Tumisang Orebonye|Orebonye]] {{goal|50}}
|stadium    = Tabarka Training Center
|location   = [[Tabarka]], Tunisia
|attendance = 0 ([[Behind closed doors (sport)|Behind closed doors]])
|referee    = 
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations#Group D|2025 AFCON Group Stage]]
|date       = 23 December
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|1}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SEN}}
|score      = 3–0
|team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Nicolas Jackson|Jackson]] {{goal|40||58}}
*[[Cherif Ndiaye|C. Ndiaye]] {{goal|90}}
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Ibn Batouta Stadium]]
|location   = [[Tangier]], Morocco
|attendance = 18,591
|referee    = [[Abdel Aziz Bouh]] ([[Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Mauritania|Mauritania]])
|report     = https://www.cafonline.com/afcon2025/match-centre?competition=190&season=2025&match=2506780
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations#Group D|2025 AFCON Group Stage]]
|date       = 27 December
|time       = {{UTZ|13:30|1}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BEN}}
|score      = 1–0
|team2      = {{fb|BOT}}
|goals1     = [[Yohan Roche|Roche]] {{goal|28}}
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Rabat Olympic Stadium]]
|location   = [[Rabat]], Morocco
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Shamirah Nabadda]] ([[Federation of Uganda Football Associations|Uganda]])
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/400132623/1z35p4iuhfxxdfaqjwzkqn2fo/207mir3y73ql1144i13i8xe6s/cfjlin4xytbsucig09ddrlmvo
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations#Group D|2025 AFCON Group Stage]]
|date       = 30 December
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|1}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|score      = 0–3
|team2      = {{fb|COD}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = *[[Nathanaël Mbuku|Mbuku]] {{goal|31}}
*[[Gaël Kakuta|Kakuta]] {{goal|41|pen|60}}
|stadium    = [[Al Barid Stadium]]
|location   = [[Rabat]], Morocco
|attendance = 
|referee    = Ahmad Heeralall ([[Mauritius Football Association|Mauritius]])
|report     = https://www.cafonline.com/afcon2025/match-centre?competition=190&season=2025&match=2506805
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{Football box collapsible
|date       = 28 March
|time       = {{UTZ|18:15|2}}
|round      = [[Mukuru Four Nations Tournament]] Semi-finals
|score      = 0–3
|report     = https://www.soccerway.com/match/botswana-naNvXTwI/zimbabwe-APEVkV8h/?mid=rD2yZNg3
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|goals1     = 
|team2      = {{fb|ZIM}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Mongameli Tshuma|Tshuma]] {{goal|24}}
*[[Macauley Bonne|Bonne]] {{goal|33}}
*[[Bill Antonio|Antonio]] {{goal|45}}
|stadium    = [[Obed Itani Chilume Stadium]]
|location   = [[Francistown]], Botswana
|attendance = 
|referee    = Chanshi Kasongo ([[Football Association of Zambia|Zambia]])
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|date       = 31 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|2}}
|round      = [[Mukuru Four Nations Tournament]] Third place play-offs
|score      = 0–1
|report     = https://www.soccerway.com/match/botswana-naNvXTwI/malawi-vT8sNsdL/
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|goals1     = 
|team2      = {{fb|MWI}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Kamogelo Moloi|Tshuma]] {{goal|66}}
|stadium    = [[Obed Itani Chilume Stadium]]
|location   = [[Francistown]], Botswana
|attendance = 
|referee    = Owen Manenda ([[Zimbabwe Football Association|Zimbabwe]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|UGA}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Botswana
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|UGA}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|BOT}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Uganda
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|LBY}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Botswana
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|LBY}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|BOT}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Libya
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|TUN}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|BOT}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Tunisia
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|BOT}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|TUN}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Botswana
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}

==Coaching history==

[[File:Freddie Mwila.JPG|thumb|200px|[[Freddie Mwila]] managed the national football team of Botswana in the 1990s]]

:Caretaker managers are listed in ''italics''.
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
*{{flagicon|RSA|1928}} [[Thomas Johnson (South African footballer)|Thomas Johnson]] (1973)
*{{flagicon|FRG}} [[Rudi Gutendorf]] (1976)
*{{flagicon|SCO}} [[Peter Cormack]] (1986–1987)
*{{flagicon|ZAM|1964}} [[Kenny Mwape]] (1990–1992)
*{{flagicon|ZAM|1964}} [[Freddie Mwila]] (1992–1994)
*{{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Freddie Mwila]] (1994–1996)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[Michael Gaborone]] (1996–1997)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]] (1997–1998)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]] (1999)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Jeff Butler (soccer)|Jeff Butler]]  (1999)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]] (2000)
*{{flagicon|GER}} [[Karl-Heinz Marotzke]] (2001)
*{{flagicon|SCG}} [[Veselin Jelušić]] (2002–2005)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} ''[[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]]'' (2006)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Colwyn Rowe]] (2006–2008)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[Stanley Tshosane]] (2008–2013)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Peter Butler (footballer, born 1966)|Peter Butler]] (2014–2017)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} ''[[Mogomotsi Mpote]]'' (2017)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[David Bright (football manager)|David Bright]] (2017–2019)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} ''[[Mfolo Mfolo]]'' (2019)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} ''[[Mogomotsi Mpote]]'' (2019)
*{{flagicon|ALG}} [[Adel Amrouche]] (2019–2022)
*{{flagicon|ZIM}} ''[[Rahman Gumbo]]'' (2022)
*{{flagicon|BOT}} [[Mogomotsi Mpote]] (2022–2023)
*{{flagicon|FRA}} [[Didier Gomes Da Rosa]] (2023-2024)
*{{flagicon|RSA}} [[Morena Ramoreboli]] (2024-) 
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[Mukuru Four Nations Tournament]] on 28 and 31 March 2026.<ref>{{cite news |title=FINAL SQUAD FOR MUKURU 4 NATIONS TOURNAMENT |url=https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=1399693102197043&set=a.480074674158895 |access-date=18 March 2026 |publisher=Botswana Football Association |date=14 March 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 31 March 2026, after the match against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Goitseone Phoko]]|age={{bda|1994|12|13|df=y}}|caps=40|goals=1|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Thabo Motswagole]]|age={{Bda|2000|4|22|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Cedric Ramojela]]|age={{Bda|2002|9|28|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Tonota FC|Tonota]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tebogo Kopelang]]|age={{bda|2000|4|24|df=y}}|caps=34|goals=3|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tlamelo Kolagano]]|age={{bda|2001|8|2|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Botsile Sakana]]|age={{Bda|2001|1|26|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thabo Babutsi]]|age={{bda|2000|7|24|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ricky Ratlhogo]]|age={{bda|2000|12|8|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thato Mosweunyane]]|age={{bda|2003|1|23|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Morupule Wanderers FC|Morupule Wanderers]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Larona Modisaemang]]|age=|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Floyd Motheo]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Matebele FC|Matebele]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Utlwang Ramakgathi]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Matebele FC|Matebele]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Monty Enosa]]|age={{Bda|2004|2|6|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Mochudi Centre Chiefs SC|Mochudi Centre Chiefs]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Omphile Ramoagi]]|age={{Bda|2004|1|3|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Theo Shadikong]]|age={{Bda|2002|3|26|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Mochudi Centre Chiefs SC|Mochudi Centre Chiefs]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Philip Kaku]]|age={{Bda|2005|2|25|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kamogelo Moloi]]|age={{Bda|2006|8|22|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=1|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Nonofo Dikutu]]|age={{Bda|2003|11|23|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Matebele FC|Matebele]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Keitumetse Samunzala]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Godfrey Tauyatswala]]|age={{bda|2001|1|25|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=1|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Eric Ookame]]|age={{bda|2001|4|3|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[MC Oujda]]|clubnat=MAR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Oarabile Sekwai]]|age={{bda|1998|11|28|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Tshepho Keselebale]]|age={{bda|2001|2|19|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Losika Ratshukudu]]|age={{bda|2006|2|1|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[NK Slaven Belupo|Slaven Belupo]]|clubnat=CRO}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Boikobo Matakule]]|age=|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Botswana Police XI SC|Police XI]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kgotso Radithongwa]]|age={{bda|2004|2|8|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players were last called up within the last twelve months.

{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Karamelo Kgosipula]]|age={{bda|2003|2|6|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Matebele FC|Matebele]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}, 28 March 2026<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kenneth Mmoko]]|age={{bda|1999|10|13|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Sua Flamingoes FC|Sua Flamingoes]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}, 28 March 2026<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kabelo Dambe]]|age={{bda|1990|5|10|df=y}}|caps=63|goals=0|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Lesenya Malapela]]|age={{bda|1996|7|10|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mosha Gaolaolwe]]|age={{bda|1993|12|25|df=y}}|caps=97|goals=2|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thatayaone Ditlhokwe]]|other=[[Captain (association football)|captain]]|age={{bda|1998|9|21|df=y}}|caps=44|goals=2|club=[[Al Ittihad SCSC (Tripoli)|Al-Ittihad]]|clubnat=LBY|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mothusi Johnson]]|age={{Bda|1997|7|28|df=y}}|caps=38|goals=1|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Alford Velaphi]]|age={{bda|1999|1|18|df=y}}|caps=36|goals=0|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Thabo Leinanyane]]|age={{bda|1993|7|27|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gape Thibedi]]|age={{bda|2000|2|2|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}, 28 March 2026<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Shaun Theron]]|age={{bda|2003|3|11|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}, 28 March 2026<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lebogang Ditsele]]|age={{bda|1996|4|20|df=y}}|caps=62|goals=3|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gape Mohutsiwa]]|age={{Bda|1997|3|20|df=y}}|caps=37|goals=4|club=[[MC Oran]]|clubnat=ALG|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Godiraone Modingwane (footballer)|Godiraone Modingwane]]|age={{Bda|1996|6|26|df=y}}|caps=30|goals=0|club=[[Botswana Defence Force XI F.C.|Botswana Defence Force]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gilbert Baruti]]|age={{bda|1992|3|16|df=y}}|caps=25|goals=1|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Olebogeng Ramotse]]|age={{bda|1998|1|17|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[Masitaoka FC|Masitaoka]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Koketso Majafi]]|age={{bda|1992|11|7|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Thero Setsile]]|age={{bda|1995|10|8|df=y}}|caps=38|goals=4|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|GUI}}, 14 October 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kabelo Seakanyeng]]|age={{Bda|1993|6|25|df=y}}|caps=77|goals=10|club=[[Maghreb of Fez]]|clubnat=MAR|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Tumisang Orebonye]]|age={{Bda|1996|3|26|df=y}}|caps=65|goals=7|club=[[Al Ittihad SCSC (Tripoli)|Al-Ittihad]]|clubnat=LBY|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Segolame Boy]]|age={{bda|1992|11|7|df=y}}|caps=49|goals=5|club=[[Township Rollers F.C.|Township Rollers]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Thabang Sesinyi]]|age={{bda|1992|10|15|df=y}}|caps=39|goals=4|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Omaatla Kebatho]]|age={{Bda|1993|6|16|df=y}}|caps=30|goals=3|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025 AFCON]]}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|30 December 2025}}<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/bots-recintlp.html |title=Botswana – Record International Players |website=[[RSSSF]] |access-date=2017-02-02 |archive-date=2022-07-10 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220710163320/https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/bots-recintlp.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Botswana.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
| 1 ||align=left| '''[[Mosha Gaolaolwe]]''' || 97 || 2 || 2013–present
|-
| 2 ||align=left| [[Joel Mogorosi]] || 93 || 16 || 2005–2019
|-
| 3 ||align=left| [[Mompati Thuma]] || 92 || 1 || 2004–2013
|-
| 4 ||align=left| [[Modiri Marumo]] || 88 || 0 || 1997–2015
|-
| 5 ||align=left| [[Ndiapo Letsholathebe]] || 78 || 0 || 2003–2013
|-
| 6 ||align=left| '''[[Kabelo Seakanyeng]]''' || 77 || 10 || 2014–present
|-
| 7 ||align=left| [[Tshepo Motlhabankwe]] || 76 || 2 || 2003–2013
|-
| 8 ||align=left| [[Mogogi Gabonamong]] || 74 || 4 || 1999–2015
|-
| 9 ||align=left| [[Dipsy Selolwane]] || 68 || 18 || 1998–2012
|-
| 10 ||align=left| '''[[Tumisang Orebonye]]''' || 65 || 7 || 2017–present
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
| 1 ||align=left| [[Jerome Ramatlhakwane]] || 24 || 61 || {{#expr:24/61 round 2}} || 2006–2018
|-
| 2 ||align=left| [[Dipsy Selolwane]] || 18 || 68 || {{#expr:18/68 round 2}} || 1998–2012
|-
| 3 ||align=left| [[Joel Mogorosi]] || 16 || 93 || {{#expr:16/93 round 2}} || 2005–2019
|-
| 4 ||align=left| [[Lemponye Tshireletso]] || 11 || 64 || {{#expr:11/64 round 2}} || 2009–2020
|-
| rowspan=2|5 ||align=left| [[Onkabetse Makgantai]] || 10 || 29 || {{#expr:10/29 round 2}} || 2014–2021
|-
|align=left| '''[[Kabelo Seakanyeng]]''' || 10 || 77 || {{#expr:10/77 round 2}} || 2014–present
|-
| 7 ||align=left| [[Moemedi Moatlhaping]] || 9 || 51 || {{#expr:9/51 round 2}} || 2004–2013
|-
| 8 ||align=left| [[Tshepiso Molwantwa]] || 8 || 45 || {{#expr:8/45 round 2}} || 1998–2006  
|-
| rowspan=2|9 ||align=left| [[Pontsho Moloi]] || 7 || 51 || {{#expr:7/51 round 2}} || 2004–2012
|-
|align=left| '''[[Tumisang Orebonye]]''' || 7 || 65 || {{#expr:7/65 round 2}} || 2017–present
|-
|}

==Competitive records==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=39|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| [[1970 FIFA World Cup|1970]] to [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
| colspan=8 |''Not a FIFA member''
| colspan=6 |''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
| colspan=8 |''Did not enter''
| colspan=6 |''Declined participation''
|-
| {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
| colspan=8 |''Did not qualify''
|4
|0
|1
|3
|1
|9
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
| colspan=8 |''Did not enter''
| colspan=6 |''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| colspan=8 rowspan=7 |''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|2
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|12
|4
|1
|7
|14
|19
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|6
|1
|2
|3
|3
|8
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|6
|2
|1
|3
|8
|10
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|4
|3
|0
|1
|7
|4
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|0
|1
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|10
|3
|1
|6
|12
|16
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
| colspan=8 rowspan=2 |''To be determined''
| colspan=6 rowspan=2 |''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!'''Total'''
! 
! {{Tooltip|0/11|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
! 
! 
! 
! 
!
!
!'''46'''
!'''13'''
!'''7'''
!'''26'''
!'''45'''
!'''69'''
|}

===Africa Cup of Nations===
{{main|Botswana at the Africa Cup of Nations}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Africa Cup of Nations]] record
! rowspan="40" width="1" |
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan|1956}} [[1957 Africa Cup of Nations|1957]]||colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Part of {{UK}}''
|colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Part of {{UK}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|United Arab Republic}} [[1959 Africa Cup of Nations|1959]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1897}} [[1962 Africa Cup of Nations|1962]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[1963 Africa Cup of Nations|1963]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia|1959}} [[1965 Africa Cup of Nations|1965]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1897}} [[1968 Africa Cup of Nations|1968]]||colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Not affiliated to CAF''
|colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Not affiliated to CAF''
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan|1956}} [[1970 Africa Cup of Nations|1970]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt|1972}} [[1974 Africa Cup of Nations|1974]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ethiopia|1975}} [[1976 Africa Cup of Nations|1976]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[1978 Africa Cup of Nations|1978]]||colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Nigeria}} [[1980 African Cup of Nations|1980]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Libya|1977}} [[1982 African Cup of Nations|1982]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}} [[1984 African Cup of Nations|1984]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[1986 African Cup of Nations|1986]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[1988 African Cup of Nations|1988]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Algeria}} [[1990 African Cup of Nations|1990]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Senegal}} [[1992 African Cup of Nations|1992]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia|1959}} [[1994 African Cup of Nations|1994]]||colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|0
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[1996 African Cup of Nations|1996]]
|10
|0
|2
|8
|5
|27
|-
|{{flagicon|Burkina Faso}} [[1998 African Cup of Nations|1998]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|0
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} {{flagicon|Nigeria}} [[2000 African Cup of Nations|2000]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|2
|-
|{{flagicon|Mali}} [[2002 Africa Cup of Nations|2002]]
|2
|1
|0
|1
|1
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia}} [[2004 Africa Cup of Nations|2004]]
|6
|0
|3
|3
|2
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[2006 Africa Cup of Nations|2006]]
|12
|4
|1
|7
|14
|19
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}} [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations|2008]]
|6
|2
|1
|3
|3
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Angola}} [[2010 Africa Cup of Nations|2010]]
|6
|1
|2
|3
|3
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}} {{flagicon|Gabon}} [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]
|Group stage
|16th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|2
|9
|8
|5
|2
|1
|7
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2013 Africa Cup of Nations|2013]]||colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}} [[2015 Africa Cup of Nations|2015]]
|8
|1
|2
|5
|2
|11
|-
|{{flagicon|Gabon}} [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations|2017]]
|6
|2
|0
|4
|5
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}} [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations|2019]]
|6
|0
|1
|5
|1
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|Cameroon}} [[2021 Africa Cup of Nations|2021]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|2
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}} [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations|2023]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|3
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]]||Group stage
|24th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|0
|7
|6
|2
|2
|2
|4
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Kenya}} {{flagicon|Tanzania}} {{flagicon|Uganda}} [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations|2027]]|| colspan="8" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
| colspan="6" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|}} [[2029 Africa Cup of Nations|2029]]
|-
!Total
!Group stage
!2/35
!6
!0
!0
!6
!2
!16
!96
!20
!20
!55
!54
!144
|}

===COSAFA Cup===
{{main|COSAFA Cup}}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 31 March 2026 after match against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Botswana|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Botswana|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=9 August 2017|archive-date=12 February 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180212084506/http://www.eloratings.net/Botswana|url-status=live}}</ref>
{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:100%; text-align:center;"
|+'''Key'''
| style="background:#CCFFCC;" width="20" |
| bgcolor="#ffffff" align="left" | '''Positive balance''' (more Wins)
|-
| style="background:#FFFFCC;" width="20" |
| bgcolor="#ffffff" align="left" | '''Neutral balance''' (Wins = Losses)
|-
| style="background:#FFCCCC;" width="20" |
| bgcolor="#ffffff" align="left" | '''Negative balance''' (more Losses)
|}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center"
|-
!width=220|Opponent<br />
!width=100|Pld<br />
!width=70|W<br />
!width=70|D<br />
!width=70|L<br />
!width=100|GF<br />
!width=100|GA<br />
!width=120|GD<br />
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ALG}} || 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 2 || 12 || −10
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ANG}} || 14 || 2 || 6 || 6 || 6 || 14 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BEN}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BFA}} || 6 || 2 || 1 || 3 || 3 || 7 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BDI}} || 5 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 2 || 1 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CAR}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 4 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CMR}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CPV}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CHA}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CHN}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 6 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COM}} || 5 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 3 || 2 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COD}} || 6 || 0 || 3 || 3 || 0 || 7 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|EGY}} || 8 || 0 || 3 || 5 || 2 || 12 || −10
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|EQG}} || 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 4 || 5 || –1
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ERI}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 1 || +4
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ETH}} || 4 || 2 || 0 || 2 || 7 || 4 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GAB}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GHA}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUI}} || 7 || 1 || 1 || 5 || 5 || 20 || −15
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GNB}} || 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 1 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|IRN}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|IRQ}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CIV}} || 4 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 11 || −10
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|KEN}} || 7 || 3 || 0 || 4 || 7 || 10 || −3
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LES}} || 31 || 15 || 11 || 5 || 39 || 23 || +16
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBR}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 3 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBY}} || 5 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 2 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAD}} || 8 || 1 || 2 || 3 || 4 || 5 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAW}} || 26 || 6 || 8 || 12 || 22 || 47 || −25
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MLI}} || 7 || 1 || 0 || 6 || 5 || 19 || −14
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MTN}} || 6 || 1 || 1 || 4 || 4 || 10 || −6
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MRI}} || 3 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 6 || 1 || +5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAR}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MOZ}} || 25 || 5 || 5 || 15 || 19 || 40 || −21
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NAM}} || 20 || 7 || 11 || 2 || 19 || 18 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NZL}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NIG}} || 3 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 4 || −2
|- 
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NGA}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEN}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 0 || 8 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RWA}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEY}} || 4 || 4 || 0 || 0 || 8 || 1 || +7
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SOM}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 1 || +4
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RSA}} || 20 || 0 || 6 || 14 || 10 || 31 || −21
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SSD}} || 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 0 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SWZ|name=Swaziland}} || 32 || 16 || 11 || 5 || 46 || 26 || +20
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SWE}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 2 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TAN}} || 5 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 7 || 9 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TOG}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TRI}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TUN}} || 8 || 2 || 2 || 4 || 5 || 12 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|UGA}} || 7 || 0 || 2 || 5 || 2 || 9 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZAM}} || 27 || 4 || 8 || 15 || 15 || 42 || −27
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZIM}} || 20 || 4 || 5 || 11 || 9 || 26 || −17
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total || 365 || 96 || 101 || 168 || 295 || 463 || −168
|}

==Honours==
===Regional===
* '''[[COSAFA Cup]]'''
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (2): 2016, 2019

===Awards===
* '''[[CAF Awards#African National Team of the Year|African National Team of the Year]] (1)''': 2011

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
{{Commons category}}
* [http://www.bfa.co.bw/ Botswana FA] official site
* [https://www.cafonline.com/member-associations/bot/ Botswana] at [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/BOT Botswana] at [[FIFA]]

{{Botswana national football team}}
{{Navboxes
| title = Squads
| bg        = #6DA9D2
| fg        = white
| bordercolor = black
| list =
{{Botswana squad 2012 Africa Cup of Nations}}
{{Botswana squad 2025 Africa Cup of Nations}}
}}
{{Botswana national football team managers}}
{{CAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Botswana}}

[[Category:1968 establishments in Botswana]]
[[Category:African national association football teams]]
[[Category:Botswana national football team| ]]
[[Category:National sports teams established in 1968]]
